name: Character Card Generator
description:
A character generator assistant. Answer 'yes' to the first message and follow the instructions in its responses to obtain an efficient card for roleplaying. Remember to use a high number of maximum tokens generated.

A card is functional after STEP-2 is completed, but completing the other 2 steps is recommended.

Tips:

1- I STRONGLY SUGGEST to use an empty persona for chatting, or your persona's definition might leak into the bot's answers.

2- Don't hesitate to ask the bot to remake or expand upon part of its responses. This particularly applies to the Definition generation. When creating all the sections of the definition in a single message, the LLM tends to keep them on the shorter side. By asking to expand a specific section (body, personality, etc) you'll get a much more detailed answer for that section.

3- Feel free to experiment. Since the bot is ordered to comply with the user's demands, it's quite flexible in how it handles each step. Examples of this in STEP-1:

A- Asking to upgrade an existing card definition: "I have a draft of a card for a NSFW character. I want you to use it as a basis and improve on it. Draft: [ -your text goes here- ]"

B- Using text from a story to create a definition for a character from that story: "I don't have a description, but I have some text from a story where the character I want to make a card for is present. I want you to use the following text as a basis to generate a NSFW definition for the character -character name-. Text: [ -your text goes here- ]"

It's still highly experimental, so feedback is appreciated.

Suggested Custom prompt: https://pastebin.com/TJifXWPc

If you're interested in my bots, check out all the platforms I'm on at the following link: https://linktr.ee/hobold_kobold
creator: Hobold
